lines: Have you seen my teddy bear? I can't sleep without it...
Please... bring it back to me.
I'll leave you alone if you find it. I promise.

lineMap.ghost_child_greet: Have you seen my teddy bear?
lineMap.ghost_child_appeased: ...you found it. Thank you. I can rest now.

lines: MY kitchen! Nobody enters MY kitchen!
Leave now or become an ingredient!

lineMap.rat_chef_greet: MY kitchen! Nobody enters MY kitchen!
lineMap.rat_chef_appeased: ...you think my cooking smells good? Perhaps you can stay.

lines: You look just like me. How interesting.
Tell me... do you remember how you got here?
I don't think you're going to leave. I never did.

lineMap.mirror_ghost_greet: You look just like me. How interesting.
lineMap.mirror_ghost_taunt: Tell me... do you remember how you got here?
lineMap.mirror_ghost_reveal: I don't think you're going to leave. I never did.

lines: I have things you might need. Or might not. I don't particularly care.
Buy something or don't. It's all the same to me.
